principles: Always index foreign key columns to improve JOIN performance
Use appropriate CASCADE rules (ON DELETE, ON UPDATE) based on business logic
Ensure referential integrity with foreign key constraints
Consider the impact of CASCADE operations on performance
Use DEFERRABLE constraints when needed for complex transactions
bestPractices: Use meaningful foreign key names that indicate the relationship
Consider using composite foreign keys when appropriate
Validate foreign key constraints match business rules
Monitor foreign key constraint violations for data quality issues
performanceConsiderations: Foreign key checks add overhead to INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE operations
Missing indexes on foreign keys cause full table scans on JOINs
CASCADE operations can be expensive; use carefully
Consider DEFERRABLE constraints for bulk operations
